parameters.query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS intake_items (id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, received_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), source_msg_id TEXT, type TEXT, title TEXT, due_at TIMESTAMPTZ, student TEXT, action_required BOOLEAN, amount TEXT, teacher TEXT, course TEXT, source_hint TEXT, confidence REAL, source_channel TEXT, source_subject TEXT, source_from TEXT); ALTER TABLE intake_items ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source_msg_id TEXT; CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS intake_items_msgid_idx ON intake_items(source_msg_id); ALTER TABLE intake_items ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS item_key TEXT; ALTER TABLE intake_items ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS original_from TEXT; CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS intake_items_itemkey_uq ON intake_items(item_key);

INSERT INTO intake_items (source_msg_id, type, title, due_at, student, action_required, amount, teacher, course, source_hint, confidence, source_channel, source_subject, source_from, item_key, original_from) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::timestamptz, $5, $6::boolean, $7, $8, $9, $10, $11::real, $12, $13, $14, $15, $16) ON CONFLICT (item_key) DO UPDATE SET type = EXCLUDED.type, title = EXCLUDED.title, due_at = EXCLUDED.due_at, student = EXCLUDED.student, action_required = EXCLUDED.action_required, amount = EXCLUDED.amount, teacher = EXCLUDED.teacher, course = EXCLUDED.course, source_hint = EXCLUDED.source_hint, confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence, source_channel = EXCLUDED.source_channel, source_subject = EXCLUDED.source_subject, source_from = EXCLUDED.source_from, original_from = EXCLUDED.original_from, received_at = now() RETURNING id, item_key;
DELETE FROM intake_items WHERE source_msg_id = $1 AND (item_key <> ALL($2::text[]) OR item_key IS NULL);
